sources.name: UBFC-rPPG
sources.access: public/research; official complete video link historically available on request; mirrors may require account
sources.expected_content: RGB face videos, PPG waveform, heart-rate ground truth
sources.why_needed: standard benchmark; matches webcam rPPG deployment closely
sources.notes: Common structure is subject*/vid.avi plus ground_truth.txt.

sources.name: PURE
sources.access: request by email to TU Ilmenau dataset contact
sources.expected_content: face videos plus JSON physiological ground truth
sources.why_needed: core benchmark with controlled motion variations and strong rPPG-toolbox support
sources.notes: Common structure is recording folder plus matching JSON file.

sources.name: LGI-PPGI Face Video Database
sources.access: CC-BY-4.0; large session archives hosted externally, some sessions unavailable
sources.expected_content: 100 face video recordings from 25 users with synchronized CMS50E PPG
sources.why_needed: in-the-wild motion, exercise, and urban conversation conditions
sources.notes: Official README lists first six large download archives and notes bandwidth limitations.

sources.name: MMPD: Multi-Domain Mobile Video Physiology Dataset
sources.access: academic-only; signed release agreement required; commercial usage banned by dataset README
sources.expected_content: mobile videos in MAT files with GT_ppg, lighting, motion, exercise, skin_color, gender, glasses, hair, makeup labels
sources.why_needed: domain diversity: skin tone, lighting, motion, talking, walking, mobile camera
sources.notes: Full dataset listed as 370GB and mini dataset as 48GB by official README.

sources.name: VitalVideos
sources.expected_content: large diverse rPPG videos with PPG/HR/SpO2/BP/RR/ECG variants depending on subset
sources.why_needed: largest and most diverse source for top quality and fairness across skin tones
sources.notes: VitalVideos-Worldwide advertises about 6500 participants and equal skin-tone representation.

sources.name: UBFC-Phys
sources.access: CC BY-NC-SA; access via dat@UBFC contact
sources.expected_content: video, BVP, EDA, social-stress protocol labels
sources.why_needed: speaking/stress tasks are close to VERDICT use cases
sources.notes: 56 participants with rest, speech, arithmetic tasks.

sources.name: VIPL-HR-V2
sources.access: universities/research institutes only; companies excluded by official page
sources.expected_content: 2500 RGB videos from 500 subjects under less-constrained conditions
sources.notes: Requires official email and signed release agreement.

sources.name: SCAMPS
sources.access: synthetic rPPG benchmark; supported by rPPG-Toolbox pretrained configs
sources.expected_content: synthetic face videos/signals for pretraining and robustness
sources.why_needed: useful for pretraining and augmentation, not a replacement for real data
sources.notes: Must be labeled synthetic in all manifests.

sources.name: COHFACE
sources.access: research dataset; access varies by host
sources.notes: Use mainly for eval unless access terms permit training.

sources.name: MAHNOB-HCI
sources.notes: Not primarily rPPG HR, but useful for robustness.

sources.name: VERDICT Own Capture
sources.expected_content: camera video plus synchronized pulse oximeter/chest strap ground truth
sources.why_needed: public data alone will not deliver top performance on our target cameras/use cases
sources.notes: Must include consent, device metadata, lighting, motion, skin tone, camera, FPS, compression, and task labels.
